exports.name: fetchProfilePayload
exports.note: Same export as the api-client--data-derivers contract; card-renderer reads ProfilePayload.user and ProfilePayload.pinned_repos directly without further derivation.

invariants: Strings consumed directly into the DOM are passed through textContent (not innerHTML) by card-renderer — api-client does not need to escape, but does not pre-render any HTML either.
pinned_repos may be an empty array (graceful empty state — FC.8); card-renderer renders 'No pinned repositories' in that case.
rationale: Pinned repos and basic user info are display-ready straight from the api-client shape; routing them through data-derivers would add a pass-through layer with no value.
